headline: Williams-Sonoma Stock: Is WSM Outperforming the Consumer Discretionary Sector?
summary: Williams-Sonoma has notably outperformed the Consumer Discretionary sector over the past year, and analysts are moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
